summary: Completed testing of MomManager 2026 iteration 2. 20/20 code structure tests passed after fixing Portuguese translation bug. All requested features verified including: removed AIChatButton floating button (replaced with inline chat modal), delete functionality for meal plans/stories/meetings, price updates (£9.99/£79.99), translation system using t() function.

issues: Minor: 'shadow*' style props deprecated warnings in console - should use 'boxShadow'

critical_code_review_comments: All requested changes verified and working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 requested features verified: 1) Dashboard index.tsx does NOT import AIChatButton, 2) Dashboard has data-testid='ai-assistant-bar', 3) Dashboard uses t('ai.hereForYou') and t('ai.tapToChat'), 4) Settings shows £9.99 monthly, 5) Settings shows £79.99 yearly (no save badge), 6) Kitchen deleteMealPlan uses window.confirm, 7) Kids has deleteStory function, 8) Kids has trash-outline for stories, 9) Kids has close-circle delete on kid chips, 10) Kids generateStory does NOT send kid_name, 11) Work has deleteItem function with trash-outline, 12) Portuguese translations pt.json exists with ai.hereForYou and ai.tapToChat keys. SettingsContext imports ptTranslations and adds it to translations map. Fixed Portuguese translation file - added missing ai.hereForYou and ai.tapToChat keys.

tests_verified.no_save_badge_yearly: PASS - Yearly plan has no discount badge
tests_verified.kids_close_circle_chips: PASS - Kid chips have close-circle delete

bug_fixed.description: Portuguese translations were missing ai.hereForYou and ai.tapToChat keys
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added 'hereForYou': 'Estou aqui para si' and 'tapToChat': 'Toque aqui para conversar com AI' to ai section
